pusht.policy: union episode_index from identity-verified train and validation base caches of paper-a-matched-host-v1 and paper-a-matched-token-v1, pinned with sidecars and host receipts at Wave 1.1 seal time

reacher_rng_exclusion.policy: new train and validation RNG seeds must be disjoint from both prior screens and all three seed registries are hash-pinned at Wave 1.1 seal time
